title: East Slavic Fairy Tales
description: Turns some mobs to East Slavic mythology creatures
body:
This resourcepack replaces some monsters _(Spawneggs done too)_ with characters from fairy tales popular among Eastern Slavs:
- Creaking - Leshy/Lyasun/Lisovyk - Pagan forest spirit
- Witch - Baba-Yaga/Yazya - Folklore witch
- Phantom - Gusi-Lebedi (Swan-geese) - The servants of Baba Yaga

Needs **EMF** for the models to work correctly
